name: Swift (Apple)
description: Swift (Apple) — Apple's compiled language for iOS, macOS, and server-side development via Swift on Server.

seo.title: Swift (Apple) — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Swift (Apple): Swift (Apple) — Apple's compiled language for iOS, macOS, and server-side development via Swift on Server.

when_to_use: iOS and macOS native app development with Swift and SwiftUI
Server-side Swift apps with Vapor or Hummingbird frameworks
Cross-platform Swift on Linux for backend API development
Performance-critical mobile apps with Swift's ARC memory model
Sharing model logic between client and Vapor server in Swift

cons: Server ecosystem small vs Go or Rust
Hiring pool narrow for backend work
review.verdict: Best-in-class for iOS, a respectable but niche server choice unless you're already an Apple shop.
review.best_for: Teams already deep in Apple platforms wanting to share Swift code between client and server
review.not_for: Non-Apple teams or anyone needing the richest backend library ecosystem
